translations.en: My imagination is running wild today.
translations.it: Oggi la mia fantasia è scatenata.
translations.pt: Hoje a minha imaginação está a mil.
translations.vi: Hôm nay trí tưởng tượng của tôi bay bổng.
translations.nl: Vandaag slaat mijn fantasie op hol.
translations.hi: आज मेरी कल्पना बेकाबू हो रही है.
translations.nb: I dag løper fantasien min løpsk.
translations.ro: Astăzi imaginația mea o ia razna.
translations.da: I dag løber min fantasi løbsk.
translations.ja: 今日は想像力が暴走しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine singular noun; modifies the subject 'Fantasie' (nominative).
Feminine noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); occupies verb-second position.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Predicative adjective functioning as a complement to the verb ('spielt verrückt' = behaves crazily).

sentences.target: Mit etwas Fantasie klappt das schon.

translations.de: Mit etwas Fantasie klappt das schon.
translations.en: With a bit of imagination, that will work.
translations.es: Con un poco de imaginación, eso saldrá bien.
translations.fr: Avec un peu d’imagination, ça va marcher.
translations.it: Con un po' di fantasia, funzionerà.
translations.ko: 조금만 상상력을 발휘하면 그건 잘 될 거예요.
translations.yue: 有少少想像力就搞得掂。
translations.pt: Com um pouco de imaginação, isso vai dar certo.
translations.tr: Biraz hayal gücüyle bu iş olur.
translations.vi: Chỉ cần một chút tưởng tượng là ổn thôi.
translations.nl: Met een beetje fantasie lukt dat wel.
translations.hi: थोड़ी कल्पना से यह हो जाएगा.
translations.pl: Z odrobiną wyobraźni to się uda.
translations.el: Με λίγη φαντασία, αυτό θα πετύχει.
translations.nb: Med litt fantasi går det fint.
translations.id: Dengan sedikit imajinasi, itu akan berhasil.
translations.ro: Cu puțină imaginație, o să meargă.
translations.da: Med lidt fantasi skal det nok gå.
translations.fi: Vähän mielikuvitusta, niin se kyllä onnistuu.
translations.ja: 少し想像力を働かせればうまくいきます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; introduces the PP 'mit etwas Fantasie'.
Indefinite quantifier used as a determiner before a noun.
Noun in the dative as the object of the preposition 'mit'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); intransitive meaning 'works out'.
Demonstrative/neutral pronoun functioning as the subject of 'klappt'.
Modal/temporal adverb adding assurance/expectation to the statement.

sentences.target: Beim Kochen fehlt mir die Fantasie.

translations.de: Beim Kochen fehlt mir die Fantasie.
translations.it: In cucina mi manca la fantasia.
translations.yue: 我煮嘢食嗰陣冇乜創意。
translations.ru: Когда я готовлю, мне не хватает фантазии.
translations.vi: Khi nấu ăn, tôi thiếu trí tưởng tượng.
translations.nl: Bij het koken ontbreekt het me aan fantasie.
translations.uk: Під час готування мені бракує уяви.
translations.hi: खाना बनाते समय मेरी कल्पना कम पड़ जाती है.
translations.el: Στο μαγείρεμα μου λείπει η φαντασία.
translations.nb: Når jeg lager mat, mangler jeg fantasi.
translations.sv: När jag lagar mat saknar jag fantasi.
translations.da: Når jeg laver mad, mangler jeg fantasi.
translations.ja: 料理のときは想像力が足りません。

tokens.explanation: Fused form of 'bei dem'; preposition governing the dative in the PP 'beim Kochen'.
Nominalized verb (gerund-like noun); object of the preposition 'Beim'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) meaning 'to be lacking'.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular, dative) marking the experiencer/indirect object.
Definite article (feminine singular, nominative) introducing the subject 'Fantasie'.
Subject noun referring to what is lacking.

sentences.target: Kinder haben viel Fantasie beim Spielen.

translations.de: Kinder haben viel Fantasie beim Spielen.
translations.en: Kids have lots of imagination when playing.
translations.es: Los niños tienen mucha imaginación al jugar.
translations.fr: Les enfants ont beaucoup d'imagination en jouant.
translations.it: I bambini hanno molta fantasia quando giocano.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们玩的时候想象力很丰富。
translations.yue: 小朋友玩嘅時候好有想像力。
translations.ru: Дети проявляют много фантазии, когда играют.
translations.pt: As crianças têm muita imaginação quando brincam.
translations.he: לילדים יש הרבה דמיון כשהם משחקים.
translations.tr: Çocuklar oyun oynarken hayal güçlerini bol bol kullanırlar.
translations.vi: Trẻ con rất giàu trí tưởng tượng khi chơi.
translations.ar: الأطفال يملكون خيالًا واسعًا عندما يلعبون.
translations.nl: Kinderen hebben veel fantasie tijdens het spelen.
translations.uk: Діти мають багато уяви, коли граються.
translations.hu: A gyerekeknek sok fantáziájuk van játék közben.
translations.hi: बच्चे खेलते समय बहुत कल्पनाशील होते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci mają bujną wyobraźnię, gdy się bawią.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά έχουν πολλή φαντασία όταν παίζουν.
translations.nb: Barn har mye fantasi når de leker.
translations.id: Anak-anak punya banyak imajinasi saat bermain.
translations.sv: Barn har mycket fantasi när de leker.
translations.ro: Copiii au multă imaginație când se joacă.
translations.cs: Děti mají při hraní hodně fantazie.
translations.da: Børn har masser af fantasi, når de leger.
translations.fi: Lapsilla on paljon mielikuvitusta, kun he leikkivät.
translations.ja: 子どもは遊ぶとき想像力が豊かです。

tokens.explanation: Plural noun serving as the subject.
Finite main verb (3rd person plural, present).
Quantifier functioning as a determiner modifying 'Fantasie'.
Direct object of 'haben'.
Fused form of 'bei dem'; preposition introducing the PP 'beim Spielen'.
Nominalized verb functioning as the object of the preposition 'beim'.
